context.last_user_request: give some suggest from my waredrobe

messages.content: I need to go to a party tonight
Nice, I can suggest something for party. What vibe do you want: minimal classy, bold statement, casual, streetwear, or semi-formal?

For a bold and dark party look, I recommend going with the "Bold Black Blazer & Trousers" outfit. It works perfectly because the fitted black blazer with the striking white paint splatter creates a sharp, polished vibe, balanced by tailored black trousers and a deep blue shirt underneath. To keep the focus on the blazer, pair it with simple black shoes and minimal accessories.

If you want something more layered, the burgundy gradient shirt with a dark biker jacket offers an edgy, streetwear feel, great for adding texture and attitude. The alternative paint-splatter blazer look is more artistic and eye-catching, perfect if you want to stand out with a unique statement piece.

All these options embrace boldness with dark tones, so you can't go wrong—just pick the vibe you want to lean into!

What should I wear for a casual day out?

For your casual day out with a bold, dark vibe, I recommend going with the "Bold Gradient Casual" outfit. The burgundy to black gradient shirt paired with relaxed black-to-gray pants creates a striking yet easygoing look that's perfect for standing out without overdoing it. Keep accessories minimal to let the gradient shine, and opt for comfortable shoes to maintain that relaxed feel.

If you want alternatives, you could try the "Layered Dark Blue Edge" which adds a sleek leather jacket for a bit of an edgy touch, or the "Alternative Urban Streetwear" that mixes a dark cardigan with bold printed cargo pants for a creative, street-style vibe. But overall, the first option hits that bold and casual sweet spot effortlessly!

I need an outfit for office tomorrow

For your office outfit tomorrow, I recommend the "Minimal Dark Office Look." It’s perfect because it pairs a fitted dark blue button-up shirt with sleek black trousers, keeping things clean, sharp, and effortlessly professional—just what a minimal, dark-tone office vibe calls for. A simple tip: tuck in your shirt neatly and keep accessories minimal to maintain that streamlined look.

If you’re open to layering, the "Layered Smart Office Outfit" adds a navy pinstripe jacket for an elevated, polished feel. Alternatively, the "Alternative Dark Casual Office" option offers a slightly more relaxed but still office-appropriate style with a dark gradient shirt and a navy cardigan.

All three outfits keep the dark, minimal aesthetic, so you can’t go wrong either way!

All three maintain the dark color preference and casual feel, so you can pick based on your mood or the day’s vibe!
